sections.about_short_text: Muhammad al-Khwarizmi Specialized School (Nukus Branch) is a prestigious educational institution providing advanced education in exact and natural sciences.
sections.directions_text: Advanced programs in mathematics, physics, computer science, and more

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.label: our pride
achievements.intro_text: Our students conquer new peaks each year at national and international subject olympiads.
achievements.cta_title: Your child can be on this list too
achievements.cta_text: Our school specializes in producing olympiad champions. Learn about admission requirements and programs.

directions_page.title: Programs
directions_page.intro_text: Our school focuses on exact sciences such as mathematics, physics, and computer science. The curriculum is aligned with international standards and aims to prepare students for both local and international olympiads.
directions_page.math_desc: Advanced study of algebra, geometry, number theory, combinatorics, and logic problems.
directions_page.physics_desc: Classical mechanics, electrodynamics, thermodynamics, and modern quantum physics.
directions_page.informatics_desc: Programming languages such as C++ and Python, algorithms, and fundamentals of AI.
directions_page.chemistry_desc: Structure of substances, chemical reactions, and basics of modern biochemistry.
directions_page.biology_desc: Cell biology, genetics, and biodiversity through laboratory work.
directions_page.languages_desc: Students are guaranteed to reach international IELTS/TOEFL levels.
directions_page.cta_text: See our students' olympiad victories and international achievements.

directions_short.math: Algebra, geometry, number theory, and combinatorics

admission_page.title: Admission Process
admission_page.section_title: How to Apply to Our School
admission_page.section_text: Admission to our specialized school consists of three stages.
admission_page.step1_text: After the open day is announced, parents must submit their child's documents through an online application to the school administration.
admission_page.doc1: Copy of passport or birth certificate
admission_page.step2_text: Candidates with complete documents take tests in Mathematics, Logical Reasoning (IQ), and English.
admission_page.step3_text: Students with high test scores are invited to the final stage — an interview with school leadership and a psychologist.
admission_page.download_text: Download the regulations (pdf) for detailed information on admission requirements and procedures.

about_history.y2010_text: The specialized school named after Muhammad al-Khwarizmi was founded by a decree of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
about_history.y2012_text: The Nukus branch opened for gifted students of the Republic of Karakalpakstan.
about_history.y2015_text: Our students won their first medals at international olympiads.
about_history.y2018_text: Modern physics, chemistry, and biology laboratories were equipped.
about_history.y2020_text: The online learning platform was successfully launched during the pandemic.
about_history.y2023_text: Over 50 olympiad medals in a single year — a record in the school's history.
about_history.y2026_text: The school operates with 520+ students, 65 teachers, and 180+ olympiad winners.
